name: Stromboli
recipeIngredient: Bread dough (1 lb per loaf, thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled.
2. Punch down the dough.
3. Roll the thawed loaves together into one 15x12-inch rectangle.
4. On half of the dough (lengthwise), layer sliced ham and pepperoni. Sprinkle with chopped onion and green pepper.
5. Spread 1/4 cup pizza sauce on top.
6. Layer sliced mozzarella, bologna, salami, and Swiss cheese over the sauce.
7. Sprinkle with dried basil, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper.
8. Spread another 1/4 cup pizza sauce on top.
9. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling and seal edges well.
10. Place the stromboli on an ungreased baking pan (15x10x1 inches).
11. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Brush with melted butter before serving.
13. Serve the remaining pizza sauce alongside the stromboli.
